user.title: 1/5 – Select areas
user.description: All areas are shown as a checklist. Selecting an area automatically exposes its assigned entities.

devices.title: 2/5 – Select devices
devices.description: All devices are labeled by area. Select only additional complete devices.

entities.title: 3/5 – Select individual entities
entities.description: All active entities are shown with area, name, domain and entity ID.

exclusions.title: 4/5 – Exclude entities
exclusions.description: Optional: select entities that must not be sent to the Apple TV app even when included through an area or device.

summary.title: 5/5 – Review selection

init.title: 1/5 – Edit areas
init.description: Currently {resolved_count} entities are exposed. Existing selections are preselected.

exclusions.title: 4/5 – Edit exclusions
exclusions.description: These entities are never exposed, regardless of area or device selection.

summary.title: 5/5 – Review changes
